_comment: Shipped preset for LTX-Video 2.3 22B image+audio-to-video (from ComfyUI's bundled video_ltx2_3_ia2v template). Outer graph: LoadImage #269 (first frame) + LoadAudio #276 (driving audio) -> subgraph #340 -> SaveVideo #341. Inner prompt node is PrimitiveStringMultiline #319; composite key '340:319'. Audio-driven video — the generation timing follows the wired audio's tempo, so VideoStage's `audio` socket is required. Reuses the same LTX 2.3 model files as t2v / i2v / flf2v — no new downloads.
label: Local LTX 2.3 IA2V
description: LTX-Video 2.3 22B image+audio-to-video. Wire a source frame into the stage's image slot AND an audio track into the audio socket (e.g. from AudioStage / ACE-Step); the generated video follows the audio's timing. Talking-head / music-video / SFX-aligned scene use cases. Requires the LTX 2.3 model files (already used by t2v/i2v/flf2v) — see workflows/video/README.md.

image.error: LTX 2.3 IA2V needs an upstream image — wire one into the stage's images slot.

audio.error: LTX 2.3 IA2V needs an audio track — wire one into the stage's audio socket (try an AudioStage).

value.default: Cinematic motion of the subject in sync with the audio.
